name: Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: Chicken broth (homemade, beef, vegetable, or turkey): 4 cups
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3 to 4 quart pot, combine all ingredients except pasta.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil.
3. Cover and simmer gently for 1 hour, stirring occasionally to break up tomatoes into bite-sized pieces.
4. Add pasta and cook for an additional 5-7 minutes until done.
